topics.title: GSC opportunity review: Last Z Redeem Codes — Active Codes, Gift Center Login, and UID
topics.source_reference: GSC weekly 2026-05-10: page opportunity and query-page signals
topics.notes: This is the strongest signal-based opportunity. The page already exists, the query intent is clear, and the proposed change stays within an established cornerstone-guide scope. It can improve query-to-page match without needing a new page. Prior run `2026-05-05-codes-gsc-opportunity-llm-approved-intake` is `closed`; keep this topic in monitoring unless new evidence materially changes the opportunity.
topics.player_value: Players searching for Gift Center and redeem code help should reach the right page faster and understand the login, UID, and redemption flow more quickly.
topics.duplication_risk: Low if role separation is preserved; medium if the page expands into overlapping economy topics beyond its current scope.
claims_to_verify: The search queries actually indicate a page mismatch rather than a temporary ranking fluctuation.
The canonical claims gift-center-only-redeem-flow, gift-rewards-mailbox, and gift-center-cluster-role-separation remain intact after any update.
The target page is still the best canonical home for Gift Center and redeem code intent.
topics.next_step: Human review should validate whether the current first-screen content can be improved without changing canonical claims or blurring cluster boundaries.
evidence: GSC page signal: codes.html had 33220 impressions, 586 clicks, 1.76% CTR, avg position 6.11.
Low CTR query: `last z gift center` had 3075 impressions, 113 clicks, 3.67% CTR, position 6.83.
Low CTR query: `last z gift center login` had 943 impressions, 43 clicks, 4.56% CTR, position 5.41.
Low CTR query: `lastz gift center` had 555 impressions, 23 clicks, 4.14% CTR, position 6.37.
Low CTR query: `last-z.com gift center` had 479 impressions, 22 clicks, 4.59% CTR, position 6.00.

site_fit.primary_user_job: Improve query-to-page match and first-screen usefulness for `last z gift center` searchers.
site_fit.archetype_reason: Existing page is `cornerstone-guide` in the `Economy` cluster; Scout should prefer updating the existing page before proposing new content.

constraints: Use existing page template and navigation patterns.
Treat GSC data as a signal, not proof that a rewrite is needed.
Protect canonical claim `gift-center-only-redeem-flow`.
Protect canonical claim `gift-rewards-mailbox`.
Protect canonical claim `gift-center-cluster-role-separation`.
Existing backlog history for this page: gift-center-ctr-pass:done.
reject_if: The query intent is already better served by another canonical page.
The proposed change would blur cluster role separation.
The improvement cannot be expressed without changing a cornerstone page beyond the approved scope.

closeout.note: Owner-reviewed no-op proposal. Current codes.html first-screen and metadata already match the intended codes hub role; no content change applied.

The page does not duplicate existing progression coverage on another page.
The external source is supportive only and not used as proof on its own.

evidence: Owner-approved wiki/reference source can reveal HQ and progression planning gaps.

It has enough practical player value to justify review, but only as an update to the existing research-costs page. topics.player_value: Players can avoid outdated research planning if branch names, costs, and table coverage are accurate and current.
topics.duplication_risk: Medium, since cost and branch coverage can overlap with general research and HQ planning pages.

The topic does not merely restate what research.html already covers.
No single external source is treated as proof for costs or progression claims.

evidence: Owner-approved research reference source can reveal branch coverage gaps and cost/name drift.
